creator: sko@rostwald.de
text:
Created attachment 259603
fix build without wayland

I just got the same build error on 14.2-RELEASE /w latest ports tree since I explicitly build everything with "OPTIONS_UNSET+=WAYLAND" in the poudriere makefile.

As upstream doesn't seem to care, can we please fix this in ports for now?

The Makefile changed a bit, so the position of the patch needed some adjustments; I attached the diff I'm currently using to build this port.
